findings.title: useState misused as side-effect for case sync
findings.issue: useState callback only runs on mount, not when evalCase changes. Prompt/expected text fields show stale values when switching cases.
findings.suggestion: Replace with useEffect keyed on evalCase.prompt and evalCase.expected_output

findings.title: cancelAll doesn't reset inline accumulators
findings.issue: cancelAll clears bulkPendingRef but not inlineAccRef or completedCasesRef, allowing stale data to leak into re-runs.
findings.suggestion: Add inlineAccRef.current.clear() and completedCasesRef.current.clear() in cancelAll

findings.title: renderMarkdown has no HTML sanitization
findings.issue: Custom regex markdown renderer passes unsanitized content to dangerouslySetInnerHTML. javascript: URLs possible in links. Low practical risk for local dev tool.
findings.suggestion: Escape HTML entities before interpolation, validate link URLs against http/https allowlist
